title: Protocol

effortMinutes.description: Duration of survey effort in minutes.

distanceKm.description: Distance covered in kilometers (for traveling protocol).

areaHa.description: Area surveyed in hectares (for area protocol).

numberOfObservers.description: Number of observers participating in the survey.

allSpeciesReported.description: If true, this is a complete checklist (all species seen were reported). If false, incomplete/targeted.

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName.

description: Survey protocol describing how an observation was conducted.

ProtocolType.description: Survey protocol types: CASUAL=incidental sighting, STATIONARY=fixed point, TRAVELING=transect/walk, AREA=systematic area survey, POINT_COUNT=timed count at point, MIST_NETTING=capture-based, PLAYBACK=audio playback, NOCTURNAL=night survey
